name: Fusion VCO2
description: Full-analog AS3340 VCO with real 12AX7/ECC83 vacuum tube overdrive. Three simultaneous waveforms with waveshape CV, transistor sub with three colour modes, BBD-based detune, hard sync, FM, and external audio input through the tube.

controls.name: Coarse Tune
controls.description: Coarse frequency control covering the full 8-octave tracking range.
controls.detail: ~8 octaves · AS3340 core · LFO-capable at extreme CCW

controls.name: Fine Tune
controls.description: Fine pitch trim for tuning against other oscillators.

controls.name: FM Amount
controls.description: Attenuator for the external FM CV input before it reaches the exponential frequency control.

controls.name: Waveshape
controls.description: Morphs the principal waveform between sine, triangle and square variants; also performs PWM on the square.
controls.detail: CCW: sine · noon: tri · CW: square/PWM · CV-modulatable via Wave input

controls.name: Detune
controls.description: Sets the amount of BBD-delayed, pitch-shifted signal mixed back into the main output to emulate a second detuned VCO.
controls.detail: Two BBD delay lines form a frequency shifter · from subtle chorus to beating unison

controls.name: Sub Level
controls.description: Dry/wet blend of the transistor sub into the main mix.
controls.detail: CCW: sub off · CW: sub dominates · sub tracks VCO at -1 / -2 oct per Colour mode

controls.name: Sub Colour
controls.description: Three-way switch selecting the sub waveform/octave character.
controls.detail: Pos 1: smooth -1 oct · Pos 2: intermediate · Pos 3: biting -2 oct square

controls.name: Tube Drive
controls.description: Drives the 12AX7/ECC83 vacuum tube overdrive that processes the sum of VCO, sub and external audio input.
controls.detail: CCW: clean · noon: warm saturation · CW: aggressive harmonic distortion

controls.name: External Audio Level
controls.description: Sets how much external audio is summed into the tube stage alongside the oscillator.
controls.detail: Line-level friendly · feed filter, VCA or second VCO for tube colouration

inputs.name: FM CV
inputs.description: Exponential FM input attenuated by the FM Amount knob. Patch audio-rate sources for classic FM tones.

inputs.name: Sync
inputs.description: Hard-sync input. Rising edges reset the VCO core phase for classic sync sweeps.

inputs.name: Wave CV
inputs.description: CV input modulating the Waveshape position, adding dynamic timbral movement and PWM.

inputs.name: External Audio
inputs.description: Line/modular audio input summed into the tube overdrive stage alongside the oscillator core.

outputs.name: Sine
outputs.description: Dedicated sine output direct from the AS3340 core, pre-waveshape, pre-tube.

outputs.name: Triangle
outputs.description: Dedicated triangle output from the VCO core, pre-waveshape, pre-tube.

outputs.name: Square / PWM
outputs.description: Dedicated square output with waveshape-controlled pulse width. Pre-tube.

outputs.name: Main Out
outputs.description: Post-tube, post-sub, post-detune mixed main output carrying the shaped waveform plus external audio through the overdrive.

behaviors.name: Tube warm-up
behaviors.description: 12AX7/ECC83 vacuum tube requires brief warm-up after powering the rack. Tone darkens and gain stabilises over the first minute as the heater reaches operating temperature.

behaviors.name: BBD detune as fake-unison
behaviors.description: Two BBD delay lines form a frequency shifter that returns a pitch-drifted copy of the oscillator. Low settings produce chorusing; higher settings emulate a second detuned VCO without using a second core.

behaviors.name: External audio through tube
behaviors.description: Any modular or line source patched to the external input is summed with the oscillator before the tube stage, turning the module into a stand-alone tube overdrive/colour effect when VCO level is low.

behaviors.name: Waveshape CV timbre
behaviors.description: Modulating Waveshape with an LFO or envelope smoothly morphs sine→tri→square with PWM at the end of travel, giving animated harmonic content from a single voice.

behaviors.name: Hard sync sweeps
behaviors.description: Sync input hard-resets the VCO phase each rising edge. Sweeping Coarse Tune over a synced master produces the classic formant-like sync lead timbres, amplified by the tube.

behaviors.name: Sub Colour voicing
behaviors.description: The three-position Colour switch changes both spectral content and effective sub octave, stepping from smooth low-end reinforcement to a biting -2 oct square useful for bass leads.

patchIdeas.name: Fat tube bass
patchIdeas.patch: Pitch CV → V/Oct · Sub Colour pos 3 · Sub full · Tube Drive 3 o'clock · Main Out → VCA → output
patchIdeas.diagram:
FUSION VCO2:
* Coarse: bass range
* Sub Colour: pos 3 (bite)
* Sub Level: max
* Tube Drive: 3 o'clock
- Seq (CV) p> Fusion VCO2 (V/Oct)
- Seq (Gate) g> VCA (Gate)
- Fusion VCO2 (Main Out) -> VCA (In)

patchIdeas.name: Detuned unison lead
patchIdeas.patch: Sequencer → V/Oct · Detune noon · Waveshape CW for PWM · Tube warm · Main Out → filter
patchIdeas.diagram:
FUSION VCO2:
* Detune: noon
* Waveshape: CW (PWM)
* Tube Drive: noon
- Seq (CV) p> Fusion VCO2 (V/Oct)
- Fusion VCO2 (Main Out) -> VCF (In)
- Env (Out) >> VCF (Cutoff)

patchIdeas.name: Dynamic waveshape pad
patchIdeas.patch: Slow LFO → Wave CV · Sub low · Tube low · Main Out → reverb
patchIdeas.diagram:
FUSION VCO2:
* Sub Level: low
* Tube Drive: low
- LFO (Out) >> Fusion VCO2 (Wave CV)
- Fusion VCO2 (Main Out) -> Reverb (In)

patchIdeas.name: Sync lead scream
patchIdeas.patch: Master VCO → Sync · Env → FM CV · Tube CW · Main Out → amp
patchIdeas.diagram:
FUSION VCO2:
* Tube Drive: CW
* FM Amount: noon
- Master VCO (Sqr) -> Fusion VCO2 (Sync)
- Env (Out) >> Fusion VCO2 (FM CV)
- Seq (CV) p> Fusion VCO2 (V/Oct)
- Fusion VCO2 (Main Out) -> VCA (In)

patchIdeas.name: External audio tube colour
patchIdeas.patch: Drum bus → External Audio · VCO level low · Tube Drive set to taste · Main Out → mixer
patchIdeas.diagram:
FUSION VCO2:
* Sub Level: 0
* Tube Drive: 2 o'clock
- Drum Bus (Out) -> Fusion VCO2 (External Audio)
- Fusion VCO2 (Main Out) -> Mixer (In)

patchIdeas.name: Classic FM bells
patchIdeas.patch: Modulator VCO → FM CV · FM Amount moderate · Sine out → VCA · no tube
patchIdeas.diagram:
FUSION VCO2:
* FM Amount: noon
* Tube Drive: low
- Mod VCO (Sine) >> Fusion VCO2 (FM CV)
- Seq (CV) p> Fusion VCO2 (V/Oct)
- Fusion VCO2 (Sine) -> VCA (In)
- Env (Out) >> VCA (CV)

patchIdeas.name: BBD chorus stack
patchIdeas.patch: Single note held · Detune swept slowly · Tri Out + Main Out mixed in stereo
patchIdeas.diagram:
FUSION VCO2:
* Detune: swept
- LFO (Out) >> Fusion VCO2 (Wave CV) // gentle shimmer
- Fusion VCO2 (Triangle) -> Mixer (L)
- Fusion VCO2 (Main Out) -> Mixer (R)

patchIdeas.name: PWM square with tube bite
patchIdeas.patch: LFO → Wave CV · Square Out → VCF · Main Out parallel for tube grit
patchIdeas.diagram:
FUSION VCO2:
* Waveshape: CW (square/PWM)
* Tube Drive: 2 o'clock
- LFO (Out) >> Fusion VCO2 (Wave CV)
- Seq (CV) p> Fusion VCO2 (V/Oct)
- Fusion VCO2 (Square) -> VCF (In)
- Fusion VCO2 (Main Out) -> Mixer (In) // parallel tube

patchIdeas.name: Drone with slow detune
patchIdeas.patch: Fixed V/Oct · slow LFO → Wave CV · Detune high · Sub max · Tube noon
patchIdeas.diagram:
FUSION VCO2:
* Detune: 3 o'clock
* Sub Level: max
- LFO (Out) >> Fusion VCO2 (Wave CV)
- Fusion VCO2 (Main Out) -> Reverb (In)

patchIdeas.name: Kick body + sub reinforcement
patchIdeas.patch: Fast decay env → FM CV · low V/Oct · Sub Colour pos 1 · short VCA
patchIdeas.diagram:
FUSION VCO2:
* Coarse: low
* Sub Colour: pos 1
* FM Amount: 2 o'clock
- Trig (Out) t> Env (Trig)
- Env (Out) >> Fusion VCO2 (FM CV)
- Env (Out) >> VCA (CV)
- Fusion VCO2 (Main Out) -> VCA (In)
